title: PS-66826 - Portfolio level Distribution Lists are not synced
author: rroesler

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Fixes mobile sync not returning portfolio-level (ProjectID NULL) distribution lists when syncing for a specific project.

**Changes:**
- Updated `s_enc_get_DistributionLists_for_sync` to include portfolio-level lists (`ProjectID IS NULL`) for any `@ProjectID`.
- Regenerated SQL proc delta/hash artifacts to reflect the stored procedure change.
- Updated packer manifests (WebUI + SQL) to adjust packaged outputs.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Core/Web Layer/WebUI/Packer.manifest | Adjusts packaged WebUI binaries (currently drops `Google.Protobuf.dll` and adds `Google.OrTools.dll`). |
| Core/SQL/record_procs_hash.sql | Updates stored-proc hash/version tracking to match SQL changes. |
| Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql | Generated delta to apply the updated `s_enc_get_DistributionLists_for_sync` in upgrades. |
| Core/SQL/base_procs.sql | Changes sync proc filtering to include portfolio-level distribution lists for project-scoped sync. |
| Core/SQL/Packer.manifest | Adds an Ignition update script to the SQL package manifest (currently references a missing file). |
</details>
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body:
`Core/Web Layer/WebUI/Packer.manifest` is marked as generated, but this change removes `bin\Google.Protobuf.dll` and replaces it with `bin\Google.OrTools.dll`. The WebUI bundle still includes several Google/Grpc assemblies that depend on `Google.Protobuf`, and other packer manifests in the repo keep `Google.Protobuf.dll` alongside `Google.OrTools.dll`. Update `Packer.targets` to include `Google.OrTools.dll` without dropping `Google.Protobuf.dll`, then regenerate the manifest so the packaged WebUI output includes both dependencies.
```suggestion
bin\Google.OrTools.dll
bin\Google.Protobuf.dll
```
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body:
`update_db_ignition_RequireDrawingGroup.sql` is listed in the SQL packer manifest, but that file does not exist under `Core/SQL/` in this branch. This will break packaging/builds that consume `Core/SQL/Packer.manifest`. Either add the missing script (with the correct name/location) or remove the entry, and make the change in `Core/SQL/Packer.targets` (the manifest is generated) before regenerating.
```suggestion

```
review_comments.author: Copilot

files.patch:
@@ -98,6 +98,7 @@ update_db_ignition_10.174.sql
 update_db_ignition_10.175.sql
 update_db_ignition_10.176.sql
 update_db_ignition_10.177.sql
+update_db_ignition_RequireDrawingGroup.sql
 update_db_ignition_template.sql
 update_db_scheduler_1.01.sql
 update_db_template.sql

@@ -58945,7 +58945,7 @@ CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_DistributionLists_for_sync
 AS
   SELECT *
     FROM DistributionLists
-   WHERE ((ProjectID IS NULL AND @ProjectID = 0) OR (ProjectID = @ProjectID))
+   WHERE (ProjectID IS NULL OR ProjectID = @ProjectID)
      AND (@LastSyncDateTime IS NULL OR LastModified > @LastSyncDateTime)
 GO

@@ -38,6 +38,15 @@ SET ANSI_NULLS, ANSI_PADDING, ANSI_WARNINGS, ARITHABORT, CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL
 SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF;
 GO
 
+ALTER PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_DistributionLists_for_sync
+  @ProjectID        int,
+  @LastSyncDateTime datetimeoffset
+AS
+  SELECT *
+    FROM DistributionLists
+   WHERE (ProjectID IS NULL OR ProjectID = @ProjectID)
+     AND (@LastSyncDateTime IS NULL OR LastModified > @LastSyncDateTime)
+GO
 
 UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 177, revision = 0, LastModified = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() where program_id = 'Procs'
 GO

@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ bin\Google.Apis.Core.dll
 bin\Google.Apis.dll
 bin\Google.Cloud.Vision.V1.dll
 bin\Google.LongRunning.dll
-bin\Google.Protobuf.dll
+bin\Google.OrTools.dll
 bin\Grpc.Auth.dll
 bin\Grpc.Core.Api.dll
 bin\Grpc.Core.dll
